title: hopea recopei
intro: Hopea recopei is a species of plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Hopea recopei include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the bark is often dried and made into a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed to reap the health benefits of this plant, such as improved digestion and immune function.
